title: JRHMS Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 29 IT Executive Posts
description: The Jharkhand Rural Health Mission Society (JRHMS) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 29 IT Executive Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, M.E./M. Tech in Computer Science Engineering, MCA can apply for the JRHMS Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the educational...
